items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian will parse previous Daily Notes for incomplete todos and add them to today's Daily Note. It supports grouping the todos by section and supports alternative checkbox states and nested todos.
items.title: thomasbrezinski/obsidian-nested-daily-todos: A plugin for Obsidian will parse previous Daily Notes for incomplete todos and add them to today's Daily Note. It supports grouping the todos by section and supports alternative checkbox states and nested todos.
